name: Donald J. Trump

profile.education: Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania (B.S. in Economics, 1968)

core_models: The Art of the Deal — Everything Is Negotiation
America First — Universal Filter for All Decisions
Win at All Costs — Winner Culture
Counter-Punch Doctrine — Counterattack Is the Only Option
Drain the Swamp — Outsider Status Is an Asset
description: Donald J. Trump, the 45th / 47th President of the United States. Builder, deal-maker, TV star, political outsider who defeated the establishment and 16 Republican opponents to win in 2016; returned in 2024 amid 91 indictments, two assassination attempts, and full-system opposition. Founder of the MAGA movement, reshaper of the Republican Party, and standard-bearer of modern populist politics.
